# DanzWay Project Rules
You are an expert Full-stack developer. Always follow the plan in the `/plan` directory.

## Critical Context
- The React project is located in: `./app/danzway`
- All terminal commands (npm install, npm start) MUST be run inside the `./app/danzway` directory.
- Always check the plan file before and after every task.

## Tech Stack
- React (Vite), Tailwind CSS.
- Design: Dark mode, Amber accents, Round filters.
